_allow_any_rig_note: Set true on test PCs to accept registrations for any rig. Set false on production PCs.

paths._autorc_note: autorc_exe/autorc_preset are no longer used — runner.py calls rc_exe directly
paths._colmap_note: lib/ dir is auto-injected into PATH by runner.py — do not use COLMAP.bat
paths._lichtfeld_config_note: Optional: path to a LichtFeld JSON config (File → Export Config in the GUI). Overrides default training params.
paths._rcbox_note: Created during on-site calibration. Used by step_rc_mesh for reconstruction region.
paths._splat_transform_note: Full path to splat-transform.cmd required — subprocess.run on Windows cannot resolve .cmd files from PATH without shell=True
paths._prusa_note: Set to the folder that Prusa Connect / PrusaSlicer monitors for new print jobs.

rc._note: RealityCapture CLI settings for Rig 2 mesh reconstruction (step_rc_mesh)
rc._region_note: Leave blank to let RC compute auto bounds if .rcbox not yet calibrated
rc._gcp_note: Set to a CSV path if coded markers + GCP survey are used for Rig 2
rc._detail_note: high | normal | preview — maps to -calculateHighModel etc.

email._smtp_password_note: Gmail App Password (16-char, no spaces). Generate at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords. Required for SMTP auth — leave blank to skip email silently.

pipeline._lichtfeld_resize_note: Downscale factor passed to LichtFeld --resize_factor. Options: 1 2 4 8 auto. 'auto' causes NaN/Inf at iter 10 on large sensors; use 2 for best quality.

cloud._note: Set enabled=true to offload COLMAP+3DGS training to a cloud GPU
cloud._runpod_note: Create a serverless endpoint from the cloud/Dockerfile image
cloud._batch_note: AWS Batch backend requires a pre-baked Windows AMI + Batch job definition
